subject: New Request: Scala Developer
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the public sector sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a lead Scala Developer with strong experience in Scala. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Scala
  • MySQL

Details:
Client: Riksdata
Start: ASAP
Duration: 6 months
Location: TBD
Rate: up to 1000 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Sofia Larsson
Tech Recruiter
Agile Minds
